hero.name: Edmond
hero.title: Backend Engineer.
hero.description: I build maintainable and scalable backend systems, as well as secure microservices, integrating AI agents, always with a smile.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: As a passionate Backend Engineer, I thrive on solving complex architectural problems and optimizing system performance. My journey in software engineering has been driven by a curiosity about how things work under the hood and a dedication to writing clean, maintainable code.

I have experience with international enterprise applications, where reliability and scalability are essential. Whether it's designing REST and/or GraphQL API systems, optimizing database queries, or implementing robust CI/CD pipelines, I take a holistic approach to backend development.

testimonials.name: Armel Fotsoh Ph.D
testimonials.text: I worked with Edmond on various Python-related projects. He has solid skills in FastAPI, Django, and everything related to asynchronous programming. Furthermore, he possesses strong knowledge in software engineering and IT system design. On a personal level, he is hardworking, calm, and rigorous.

testimonials.name: Joel Guiffou
testimonials.text: I greatly enjoy working with Edmond on a daily basis. Beyond being a competent developer, he is a kind and committed person in everything he does; he truly puts his heart into his work. He is also a mentor who is present for his juniors, motivated to share and pass on his knowledge. My wish is that our teamwork never ends. I highly recommend him.
